video.caption: A walkthrough of our new NYEF teacher housing.

highlights.title: Housing Crisis Response
highlights.text: NYEF continues to address one of Gardiner’s most urgent needs by expanding affordable teacher and staff housing.

highlights.title: Growing Capacity
highlights.text: NYEF has transformed existing properties into multiple housing units and continues to add new units in partnership with the school.

highlights.title: Supporting Recruitment and Retention
highlights.text: Providing affordable, high-quality housing helps Gardiner Public Schools attract and retain the educators students depend on.

featured_link.text: Check out KBZK's news report on our housing project.

gallery.alt: Interior living area of teacher housing
